{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = The Last Horizon bridge
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The largest chair on the bridge of [[The Last Horizon]] is Shyrax's seat.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c25">''The Pilot'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
